name: Wakti AI
description: Smarter. Faster. Easier. Wakti AI is your All-In-One Digital Empire. Built for the visionaries of the GCC, Wakti fuses professional productivity, creative mastery, and lifestyle intelligence into a single interface. Generate cinematic media, build apps with Vibe Coding, clone your voice, and master your life with our integrated assistant, health OS, and smart calendar. Step into high-performance living with the world’s first truly integrated AI ecosystem.
